title: A New Magazine About the Sea
article_text: Somebody started a new magazine about the sea. The first issue has a beautiful shape on the cover. My sister saw it and immediately smiled. She said, "Welcome to our generation's favorite reading!" The magazine helps with communication between traditional and modern people. An agent from the company wants to replace old books with this one. I cannot judge the book by its cover because the content is more important. The author wrote the article herself without any difficulty. Suddenly, I saw a rock in the picture of the sea. I estimate that many people will purchase this magazine because of its original dream about ocean life.
